title: Dinner
wikitext:
[]: Dinner (2.0 Spoilers)             Quote Post by OKdesuKA » Sun Aug 02, 2009 3:52 am After watching 2.0 I see the big emphasis on meals... It's really too damn bad we didn't get to see the dinner party as planned. I hope to god they make amends and have another in Quickening.. that is if Rei and Shinji ever come out.. What are your thoughts? What kind of things would you have liked to have seen at the dinner party? I wonder if Gendo would have gotten a laugh with everyone... or would there be a very awkward silence?

[]:             Quote Post by Strings » Sun Aug 02, 2009 4:43 am I personally think that 2.0 was Anno's opportunity to show the audience a glimpse of the pilots' social lives on the lighter side. I'm expecting 3.0 & 4.0 to be more straight forward and to the point so I don't think Rei will be hosting any dinner parties. But what do I know? I'm not Anno. I bet he doesn't even know what's going on.

[]: Re: Dinner (2.0 Spoilers)             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sun Aug 02, 2009 5:05 am OKdesuKA wrote: I hope to god they make amends and have another in Quickening.. that is if Rei and Shinji ever come out..

[]:             Quote Post by Combs » Sun Aug 02, 2009 5:12 am Strings wrote: I personally think that 2.0 was Anno's opportunity to show the audience a glimpse of the pilots' social lives on the lighter side. I'm expecting 3.0 & 4.0 to be more straight forward and to the point so I don't think Rei will be hosting any dinner parties. But what do I know? I'm not Anno. I bet he doesn't even know what's going on.

[]: Re: Dinner (2.0 Spoilers)             Quote Post by LiLi » Sun Aug 02, 2009 5:47 am SaltyJoe wrote: Maybe a "last supper" reference will be thrown in for extra symbolism.

[]:             Quote Post by Duskbyday » Sun Aug 02, 2009 12:57 pm I was really annoyed not seeing the party, but hey I'm sure can make up for it. I am hoping for an arkward dinner like in episode 22 with Asuka, Misato and Shinji. ^^

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Aug 02, 2009 1:41 pm I read the topic in King Harkinian's voice by default. That is all.

[]:             Quote Post by OKdesuKA » Sun Aug 02, 2009 1:57 pm Swords for dinner in 3.0!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Aug 02, 2009 4:35 pm It probably won't happen. Gendo and Shinji blew their chances with each other given what happened to Asuka in Eva-03. The only way I COULD see it happening as a "last supper" deal (but in this case their would be only Misato, Rei, Shinji and maybe Asuka as well as another pilot or two) before some final battle (Kaworu?) like somebody else mentioned.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinjiikari1991 » Tue Aug 04, 2009 9:56 pm wspeaking of dinner scence was Misato mad at Kaji for something or was it just drunk talk not that i know Japanese

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Aug 04, 2009 10:03 pm Shinjiikari1991 wrote: wspeaking of dinner scence was Misato mad at Kaji for something or was it just drunk talk not that i know Japanese

[]:             Quote Post by Shinjiikari1991 » Tue Aug 04, 2009 10:26 pm NAveryW wrote: The scene's been translated.[/url]

[]: Re: Dinner (2.0 Spoilers)             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Aug 04, 2009 11:06 pm OKdesuKA wrote: It's really too damn bad we didn't get to see the dinner party as planned.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Aug 05, 2009 3:25 am In case you guys hadn't noticed "dinner" and food motif runs very strongly through eps 17 and 18 - especially 18 where it is often exploited in scene cuts.
